2. 【招生计划】本省物理类计划2021–2022年均为51人，2023年47人，2024年41人，2025年42人；2026年计划41人，较2025年微缩2.4%，延续近年缩招趋势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第56名，属全国顶尖政法类院校，对物理类考生同样具有吸引力；抖音热度总排名第6（高热），学校 整体曝光度高；2026年声誉评价偏负面（旧事），影响有限；物理类招生专业以法学为主，法学A+学科对物理类考生同样有吸引力；法学为A+学科（全国最高等 级），物理类招生中法学（法学人才培养模式改革实验班）等王牌专业位次极高（2025年约2874名），但普通法学及经管类专业位次相对靠后。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业 热度2024年评估为“分化观望”，但法大法学仍为顶尖；物理类考生2026年约456000人，较2025年440208人增长约3.6%，竞争略有加剧，较2024 年442分略降，但整体竞争环境仍偏紧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划微缩（-2.4%）、考生小幅增加（+3.6%）及法学A+学科吸引力，预 计2026年后移趋势延续但幅度收窄；预测最低位次约16124名，区间15624–16624名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 9436 → 12968 → 14271 → 15372 → 16327, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 6891 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 16327, showing a clear backward trend.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 51 in both 2021 and 2022, 47 in 2023, 41 in 2024, and 42 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 41, a slight decrease of 2.4% from 2025, continuing the recent trend of shrinking enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, a top national political science and law institution, also attractive to Physics Category candidates; Douyin popularity total ranking 6th (high heat), with high overall school exposure; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (old incidents), with limited impact; the Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly law, and the A+ law discipline is also attractive to Physics Category candidates; law is an A+ discipline (the highest national level), and among Physics Category enrollment, the top majors like Law (Legal Talent Training Model Reform Experimental Class) have very high rankings (about 2874 in 2025), but ordinary law and economics/management majors have relatively lower rankings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the law major in 2024 was assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see', but CUPL law remains top-tier; the number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, with slightly intensified competition; compared to 442 points in 2024, it has slightly decreased, but the overall competitive environment remains tight.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of Physics Category historical rankings, the slight contraction of the 2026 enrollment plan (-2.4%), a small increase in candidates (+3.6%), and the appeal of the A+ law discipline, it is predicted that the backward trend will continue but with a narrowed range; the predicted minimum ranking is about 16124, with a range of 15624–16624.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law (Legal Talent Training Model Reform Experimental Class)
- Law (International Rule of Law Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Law (Discipline Inspection and Supervision Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Law (General)
- Law (Economics Dual Degree Program)
- Information Management and Information Systems (Data Law Experimental Class, Jointly Cultivated with Beijing Institute of Technology)
- Economics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Business Administration (Innovation and Intellectual Property Management Direction)
- Discipline Inspection and Supervision (Outstanding Legal Discipline Talent Training Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15624–16624, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety; Physics Category candidates applying to CUPL law should note that the law experimental classes have very high rankings (about 2874–4349), far above the school line, while ordinary law (about 15254) is closer to the predicted ranking.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1827 → 1981 → 2416 → 2361 → 2177, showing an overall backward trend, with fluctuations between 2177 and 2416 in the past three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2177, a recovery compared to 2024 (ranking number decreased), reflecting a slight rebound in application popularity; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 63 in both 2021 and 2022, 67 in 2023, 79 in 2024, and increased to 88 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 82, a reduction of about 6.8% from 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 46–56 range in recent years, making it a top national political science and law institution.
4. [Reputation Popularity] Ranked 6th overall in Douyin popularity (high heat), with significant influence from famous teachers like Luo Xiang and high short video exposure; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving old incidents from 2016), but the impact is limited; in 2024, the law category in Inner Mongolia experienced a sharp drop in admission scores, but this is an isolated case in other provinces and has little effect on Guangdong; law is an A+ discipline (the highest national level) and the core flagship major of the university, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; other enrolled majors such as political science, sociology, and journalism, while not A+ in law, remain competitive due to the CUPL platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the law major in 2024 was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see,' but overall remains relatively hot; the number of History Category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition, with a substantial rise compared to the 428 points in 2024, reflecting a tightening overall competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant increase in History Category candidates in 2026 (+11.6%), a slight reduction in enrollment plan (-6.8%), sustained high Douyin popularity attracting attention, and the strong A+ law discipline, competition in 2026 is expected to further intensify compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2118, with a range of 1737–2499.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (Legal Talent Training Model Reform Experimental Class)
- Law (Foreign-Related Legal Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Law (Discipline Inspection and Supervision Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Law (General)
- English (Legal English Experimental Class)
- Translation (Legal Translation Experimental Class)
- Network and New Media
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Administrative Management
- Business Administration (Innovation and Intellectual Property Management)
- International Politics
- Ideological and Political Education
- Social Work.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1737–2499, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<1737), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 law experimental classes; for rankings near the upper limit (>2499), mainly rely on Tier 3 as safety. Law A+ is the absolute flagship of CUPL with high social recognition, so prioritize it.
